# DSCR Calculator & Guide

> What is DSCR? Debt service coverage ratio = NOI ÷ annual debt service. Free DSCR calculator, the formula with a worked example, and what counts as a good DSCR.

DSCR = NOI ÷ annual debt service. Use the free calculator below, see the formula with a worked example, and learn the ratio lenders look for.

## Key pages
- Home: https://debtservicecoverageratios.com/
- Free hotel debt diagnostic tool: https://debtservicecoverageratios.com/diagnostic.html

## What this site covers
- What DSCR measures
- The formula, with an example
- What counts as a good DSCR
- How to improve your DSCR

## About
A Modern Hospitality Solutions service — independent hotel debt, capital, and commercial advisory for hotel owners.
